flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Central Louisiana Technical Community College fell 45% between 2006 and 2009 (73.1% → 40.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Central Louisiana Technical Community College rose 27% between 2017 and 2020 ($5.5k → $7.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Central Louisiana Technical Community College fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4k → 1.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Central Louisiana Technical Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.7% → 0.0%).
